sprite

pointer.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include <boost/intrusive_ptr.hpp>
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00010   struct Node;
00011   struct NodePtr;
00012   bool skip_fwd_ref(NodePtr & ptr, Node & ref);
00013 
00023   struct NodePtr : private boost::intrusive_ptr<Node>
00024   {
00025   private:
00026     typedef boost::intrusive_ptr<Node> base_type;
00027   public:
00028     typedef Node element_type;
00029 
00030     NodePtr() {}
00031     NodePtr(Node * p, bool add_ref = true) : base_type(p,add_ref) {}
00032     NodePtr(NodePtr const & r) : base_type(r) {}
00033 
00034     using base_type::operator=;
00035     using base_type::reset;
00036     using base_type::swap;
00037     using base_type::operator unspecified_bool_type;
00038     using base_type::operator!;
00039 
00041     Node * get() const
00042     {
00043       // It is okay to update this pointer by removing FWD nodes, even if the
00044       // pointer is const.
00045       NodePtr * this_ = const_cast<NodePtr *>(this);
00046 
00047       // Skip FWD nodes.  The implementation is supplied externally by the function
00048       // skip_fwd_ref.
00049       Node * ref = this->base_type::get();
00050       if(!ref) return 0;
00051 
00052       while(true)
00053       {
00054         if(!skip_fwd_ref(*this_, *ref)) break;
00055         ref = this->base_type::get();
00056         assert(ref);
00057       }
00058       return ref;
00059     }
00060 
00066     Node & operator*() const
00067     {
00068       assert(this->get() != 0);
00069       return *this->get();
00070     }
00071 
00077     Node * operator->() const
00078     {
00079       assert(this->get() != 0);
00080       return this->get();
00081     }
00082   };
00083 
00084   // Define operators ==, != and < for NodePtr.
00085   #define SPRITE_BINARY_OP_DECL(op)                               \
00086     inline bool operator op(NodePtr const & a, NodePtr const & b) \
00087       { return a.get() op b.get(); }                              \
00088     
00089   SPRITE_BINARY_OP_DECL(==)
00090   SPRITE_BINARY_OP_DECL(!=)
00091   SPRITE_BINARY_OP_DECL(<)
00092   #undef SPRITE_BINARY_OP_DECL
00093 }
